description_long: This is a small, sturdy dog with a compact body and a dense, wiry coat that transitions from a tan head and legs to a darker grayish-black back and sides. The face is characterized by a pronounced, bushy beard and eyebrows, giving it a distinctive, expressive look. Its ears are pricked and triangular, standing upright and alert atop the head. The tail is short and held straight, not curled or raised. The eyes are round, dark, and set forward, contributing to an alert and intelligent expression. The overall build is muscular yet agile, typical of a terrier breed, and the coat texture appears rough and matte.
description: A small, wiry-coated terrier dog with pricked ears, a bushy beard, and a short, straight tail. Its coat is tan on the head and legs, with a darker gray-black body.
description_view_0: Front view shows the dog's pricked ears, round eyes, and prominent bushy beard and eyebrows.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the dog's compact body, wiry coat, and short, straight tail.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the short tail, muscular hindquarters, and the transition from dark back to lighter head and legs.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the wiry coat, pricked ears, and bushy facial features.
